message:
feat: BigInt support in bytecode VM for eval() with arbitrary precision integers

- Add PyBigIntObject struct for arbitrary precision integers > i64
- Add PyBigInt_Type type descriptor and PyBigInt_Check function
- Add bigint TypeId variant for type introspection
- Update bytecode VM LoadConst to handle bigint constants
- Update bytecode VM binaryOp for BigInt arithmetic operations
- Update bytecode VM unaryInvert for BigInt bitwise NOT
- Add TypeError check for ~float operations
- Update expr_parser to detect i64 overflow and store as bigint
- Add BigInt methods: neg(), toInt(), toFloat()
- Add BigInt handling in JSON serialization
- Update pyObjToBigInt to handle PyBigIntObject

Fixes test_unary.py test_no_overflow (5/6 tests now passing)
